# client { #socialinfrascorepy.client }

```python
client(supabase_url, anon_key, access_token=None, refresh_token=None)
```

Create a socialinfrascorepy API client.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name          | Type   | Description                                                  | Default    |
|---------------|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| supabase_url  | str    | Supabase project URL (e.g. ``https://project.supabase.co``). | _required_ |
| anon_key      | str    | Supabase anon / publishable API key.                         | _required_ |
| access_token  | str    | Authenticated access token.                                  | `None`     |
| refresh_token | str    | Refresh token.                                               | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type     | Description                                            |
|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------|
|        | SIClient | A client object passed to all other package functions. |

## Raises {.doc-section .doc-section-raises}

| Name   | Type             | Description                               |
|--------|------------------|-------------------------------------------|
|        | SIScorecardError | If *supabase_url* or *anon_key* is empty. |

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> import os, socialinfrascorepy as si
>>> cli = si.client(
...     os.environ["SUPABASE_URL"],
...     os.environ["SUPABASE_ANON_KEY"],
... )
```
